TimeEntry.Title: Partition Details of the Device(%) for C: is 86, threshold value for this monitor is 85 - Max-dc-vdi-gi
TimeEntry.Notes: An alert was triggered in MyOps for server MAX-DC-VDI-GI, indicating

TimeEntry.Title: DESKTOP Alert - Critical - AKT-DC-VDI-01.maxproleasing.localCPU Utilization
TimeEntry.Notes:
Worked on the assigned ticket. Logged into the OPS manager and observed machine AKT-DC-VDI-01 has CPU threshold error. So
Connected to machine from manage engine and killed the unnecessary task f

TimeEntry.Notes:
Review the my remote portal, and found  the machine MAX-DC-AD-01,MAX-DC-VDI-GI,AKT-DC-VDI-01
running with old version of screenconnect. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, bu

TimeEntry.Title: Virtual Disk consolidation required - AKT-DC-FS-01.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server AKT-DC-FS-01&nb

TimeEntry.Title: Clear the critical alert on the Max-dc-ad-01. for Ops Manager.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to the Ops Manager portal and found that the server was showing WMI critical alerts. Checked and cleared the alerts, then restarted the SNMP services. After that, I rediscovered the serve

TimeEntry.Title: DESKTOP Alert - Critical - AKT-DC-VDI-02.maxproleasing.localCPU Utilization
TimeEntry.Notes:
Worked on the assigned ticket. Logged into the OPS manager and observed machine AKT-DC-VDI-02 has CPU threshold error. So
Connected to machine from manage engine and killed the unnecessary task f

TimeEntry.Title: Failed Veeam backups for MAX
TimeEntry.Notes: While monitoring the Veeam backups for MAX from the VSPC admin console, found that the backups had failed. Connected to the TE-DC-BK-VBR-01 server and troubleshot the issue. After that, retried the backup job, and the backups have now completed successfully.

TimeEntry.Title: My Remote version 25.7.7.9426 updated on machine AKT-DC-FS-01,MAX-DC-AD-01,MAX-DC-VDI-002
TimeEntry.Notes:
Review the my remote portal, and found  the machine AKT-DC-FS-01,MAX-DC-AD-01,MAX-DC-VDI-002
running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine  .
Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 25.7.7.9426. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest
version of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Installed Missing Patches on AKT-DC-FS-01, MAX-DC-AD-01, MAX-DC-VDI-002
TimeEntry.Notes:
Installed Missing Patches on AKT-DC-FS-01, MAX-DC-AD-01, MAX-DC-VDI-002


2025-10 Cumulative Update for Microsoft server operating system version 21H2 for x64-based Systems (KB5066782) (CVE-2025-24052) (CVE-2025-24990) (CVE-2025-59230) (CVE-2025-47827)
Microsoft Edge for chromium business (142.0.3595.80) (x64)
VMware tools 13 (x64) (13.0.5)

TimeEntry.Title: AKT-DC-FS-01 : Cisco umbrella updated with latest version
TimeEntry.Notes: AKT-DC-FS-01-Cisco umbrella updated with latest Cisco Secure Client Version: 5.1.12.146 successfully.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: MAX-DC-VDI-GI : Installed myremote agent
TimeEntry.Notes: MAX-DC-VDI-GI: During a comparison between MyRemote and MyRMM, I identified that the agent was not syncing, despite showing as active in MyRMM. Upon accessing the machine, I found that the agent was not installed. I reinstalled it, and it is now syncing correctly with the server.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version updated 7.31.20308.0 on AKT-DC-FS-01 & MAX-DC-AD-01
TimeEntry.Notes: After checking the CrowdStrike portal, I found that  Crowdstrike latest version updated AKT-DC-FS-01 & MAX-DC-AD-01 needed updates. I updated both to version 7.31.20308.0

TimeEntry.Title: MAX-DC-VDI-001 : Myremote agent installation (missing)
TimeEntry.Notes: uring the check, it was identified that the MyRemote agent was missing on MAX-DC-VDI-001. The agent was deployed remotely and installed successfully.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Manage engine agent not syncing with portal on machines MAX-DC-VDI-GI,MAX-DC-VDI-002,MAX-DC-AD-01,AKT-DC-FS-01
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login into Manage engine portal and found the agent on machines MAX-DC-VDI-GI,MAX-DC-VDI-002,MAX-DC-AD-01,AKT-DC-FS-01
 not communicating with portal. So connected to the machine, tried to restart the service, but nothing happened.
So run the agent troubleshooting tool on machines. After that agent on machine is communicating with the portal.

TimeEntry.Title: Installed Missing and Failed patches on VDI and Servers
TimeEntry.Notes:
Installed Missing and Failed patches on VDI and Servers
AKT-DC-FS-01, MAX-DC-AD-01, MAX-DC-VDI-002, MAX-DC-VDI-GI, MAX-DC-VDI-GI


Microsoft Edge for chromium business (143.0.3650.66) (x64)
The latest update for Microsoft Defender (1.441.755.0)
Windows Malicious Software Removal Tool x64 - Nov 2025 (KB890830)
2025-10 Cumulative Update for Microsoft server operating system version 21H2 for x64-based Systems (KB5070884)

TimeEntry.Title: MAX_DC_VDI_GI Probe is down.
TimeEntry.Notes: While logging into the OPS Manager admin console, found that the JDH probe was down. Logged into the Machine MAX-DC-VDI-GI to check whether the probe was installed or not. Probe was not installed, so download the probe and installed it on machine. Then add probe device in portal and download the license and updated on machine. Then started the probe service. After that found SNMP service was not installed. So installed the SNMP service and setup SNMP string. Now device discovery is pending on portal.

TimeEntry.Title: Update failed patches on MAX-DC-VDI-001 & MAX-DC-AD-01
TimeEntry.Notes:
Identified failed patches on the servers MAX-DC-VDI-001 and MAX-DC-AD-01. Connected to both systems to address the issue and manually installed the required updates. The following patches were successfully applied:

  • 2025-12 Cumulative Update for Microsoft Server Operating System version 21H2 (x64) – KB5071547
    (CVE-2025-62221, CVE-2025-54100)

  • Windows Malicious Software Removal Tool (x64) – December 2025 – KB890830

  • scan was performed through the management portal to confirm that all patches were installed successfully. The patch status is now clear on both servers.

TimeEntry.Title: Myremote version upgrade to Latest Version - 25.8.3.9466
TimeEntry.Notes:
Myremote version upgrade to Latest Version - 25.8.3.9466


Pushed the agent from portal but no luck so then connected to below server and uninstalled old version (25.7.7.9426) of myremote and installed the latest version on them, verified all VMs are up and running in myremote now.


AKT-DC-FS-01, MAX-DC-AD-01, MAX-DC-VDI-002, MAX-DC-VDI-GI, MAX-DC-VDI-GI

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.32.20403.0)updated on machines MAX-DC-AD-01, MAX-DC-VDI-002, MAX-DC-VDI-GI
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into Crowd strike portal to check the machines with outdated version. Found machines MAX-DC-AD-01, MAX-DC-VDI-002, MAX-DC-VDI-GI running with older version of crowd strike. So connected to machines from backend and uninstalled the old version and downloaded and installed the latest sensor version 7.32.20403.0 of CrowdStrike, verified from the portal. it is updated now. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Manage-Engine Latest version updated 11.4.2528.25.W - AKT-DC-FS-01,MAX-DC-AD-01,MAX-DC-VDI-002,MAX-DC-VDI-GI
TimeEntry.Notes:
Review the My RMM portal, and found the machine AKT-DC-FS-01,MAX-DC-AD-01,MAX-DC-VDI-002,MAX-DC-VDI-GI running with old version of 
Manage-Engine. So connected to the machine  and then uninstalled the OLD version and downloaded and installed the latest
version (11.4.2528.25.W) of the manage-engine agent. Verified from the portal, device is running with updated agent version.

TimeEntry.Title: MyRMM Manage Engine agent upgraded to the latest version 11.4.2528.28 on MAX-DC-AD-01, MAX-DC-VDI-001, MAX-DC-VDI-002, MAX-DC-VDI-GI
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the portal, Found New Agent Version (11.4.2528.28 W) was released, and Pushed the sensor from the portal but it failed so connected to the below machine (MAX-DC-AD-01, MAX-DC-VDI-001, MAX-DC-VDI-002, MAX-DC-VDI-GI) Tried to update the version but got an error (old version is already installed on it) so removed the earlier installed version. Downloaded and installed the new version after verifying the same from the portal, Devices are up to date with the latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Snapshot consolidation required - AKT-DC-FS-01, MAX-DC-AD-01.
TimeEntry.Notes:
Logged in to vCenter and found the following servers are on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully and then login to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine.

AKT-DC-FS-01, MAX-DC-AD-01.

TimeEntry.Title: My Remote version 25.9.5.9483 updated on machine AKT-DC-FS-01,MAX-DC-AD-01,MAX-DC-VDI-001,MAX-DC-VDI-GI
TimeEntry.Notes:
Review the my remote portal, and found  the machine AKT-DC-FS-01,MAX-DC-AD-01,MAX-DC-VDI-001,MAX-DC-VDI-GI
running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine  .
Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 25.9.5.9483. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest
version of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: All the servers showing offline in my remote for MAX
TimeEntry.Notes:
Ticket Update – MAX Site Connectivity Issue

As per handover from Satish, MAX site servers were showing as offline. Verified in the ManageEngine portal and confirmed the servers were online. Connected to MAX-DC-AD-01 via ManageEngine and checked ScreenConnect services; services were restarted but the issue persisted.

Further troubleshooting revealed the server did not have internet connectivity. IP configuration was verified and found to be correct. Investigated the network configuration, identified an incorrect network segment, and corrected it. After updating the network segment, internet connectivity was restored and the issue was resolved.

TimeEntry.Title: Failed Veeam backups for MAX
TimeEntry.Notes: While monitoring the Veeam backups for MAX from the VSPC admin console, found that the backups had failed. Connected to the TE-DC-BK-VBR-01 server and troubleshot the issue. After that, retried the backup job, and the backups have now completed successfully.

TimeEntry.Title: Manage-Engine Latest version updated 11.5.2600.19.W - MAX-DC-VDI-GI,MAX-DC-VDI-001,AKT-DC-FS-01,MAX-DC-AD-01
TimeEntry.Notes:
Review the My RMM portal, and found the machine MAX-DC-VDI-GI,MAX-DC-VDI-001,AKT-DC-FS-01,MAX-DC-AD-01 running with old version of 
Manage-Engine. So connected to the machine  and then uninstalled the OLD version and downloaded and installed the latest
version (11.5.2600.19.W) of the manage-engine agent. Verified from the portal, device is running with updated agent version.

TimeEntry.Notes:
Review the my remote portal, and found  the machine AKT-DC-FS-01,MAX-DC-AD-01,MAX-DC-VDI-001,MAX-DC-VDI-002,MAX-DC-VDI-GI running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine .
Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 25.9.9.9533. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest version of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Notes:
Login into Crowd strike portal to check the machines with outdated version. Found machines AKT-DC-FS-01,MAX-DC-AD-01,MAX-DC-VDI-001,MAX-DC-VDI-002
running with older version of crowd strike. So connected to machines and uninstalled the old version  and downloaded and installed the latest sensor version 7.33.20505.0
of CrowdStrike, verified from the portal. it is updated now. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Manual Installation Required for Cisco Secure Client on MAX-DC-VDI-GI
TimeEntry.Notes:
After reviewing the management portal, it was identified that the following system requires a manual update:

MAX-DC-VDI-GI

The following component needs to be manually uploaded and installed:

  • Cisco Secure Client - AnyConnect VPN – Manual installation required

Remote access will be used to download and install the required setup file. Once completed, a scan will be performed through the portal to verify that the system reflects the latest version.

Logged in to vCenter and found the following servers are on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully and then login to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine.

AKT-DC-FS-01, MAX-DC-AD-01.

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version V0.14.146 on MAX-DC-AD-01, AKT-DC-FS-01
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following machines on  is old version V0.14.132. Connected to the machines
MAX-DC-AD-01, AKT-DC-FS-01 from manage engine, download and installed the latest version Ver0.14.146. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.34.20610.0)updated on machines AKT-DC-FS-01,MAX-DC-AD-01,MAX-DC-VDI-001,MAX-DC-VDI-002
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Crowd strike portal to check the machines with outdated version. Found machines AKT-DC-FS-01,MAX-DC-AD-01,MAX-DC-VDI-001,MAX-DC-VDI-002 running with older version of crowd strike. So connected to machines and uninstalled the old version and downloaded and installed the latest sensor version 7.34.20610.0 of CrowdStrike, verified from the portal. it is updated now. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Device Non-Compliant Due to Missing Patches MAX-DC-VDI-002,MAX-DC-AD-01,MAX-DC-VDI-001,MAX-DC-VDI-GI
TimeEntry.Notes:
The machines MAX-DC-VDI-002, MAX-DC-AD-01, MAX-DC-VDI-001, and MAX-DC-VDI-GI were identified with missing patches during the last scan in the ManageEngine portal.

The required updates were downloaded and installed successfully. The following patches were applied:

  • Update for Microsoft WebView2 Runtime (x64) (146.0.3856.59)

  • Update for Microsoft 365 Apps for Business Current Channel for x64 2602 of version (19725.20172)

  • Microsoft Edge for Chromium Business (146.0.3856.59) (x64) – addressing CVE-2026-3910

After installation, the systems were scanned again from the ManageEngine portal to verify patch compliance. The scan confirmed that the previously missing patches have been successfully installed and the vulnerabilities have been cleared

TimeEntry.Title: Device Non-Compliant Due to Missing Patches- AKT-DC-FS-01, MAX-DC-AD-01, MAX-DC-VDI-001, MAX-DC-VDI-002, MAX-DC-VDI-GI.
TimeEntry.Notes:
Logged into the MYRMM portal and then worked on the following machine. Download and install all pending updates on the machine. After that verify all the machines are up and working fine.

AKT-DC-FS-01, MAX-DC-AD-01, MAX-DC-VDI-001, MAX-DC-VDI-002, MAX-DC-VDI-GI.

TimeEntry.Title: Device Non-Compliant Due to Missing Patches MAX-DC-VDI-GI & MAX-DC-VDI-002
TimeEntry.Notes:
Devices MAX-DC-VDI-GI and MAX-DC-VDI-002 were identified as non-compliant due to missing patches.

Logged in to the ManageEngine portal and verified pending updates on both systems. Proceeded with patch installation for the following updates:

  • Google Chrome (x64) – Versions 146.0.7680.153 / 146.0.7680.154
  • Microsoft 365 Apps for Enterprise (Current Channel, x64) – Version 2602 (Build 19725.20190)

After installation, performed a manual patch scan on both systems to verify successful deployment and to clear the pending patch status.

Post validation, confirmed that all patches have been successfully applied and no high vulnerabilities remain. Both systems are now compliant as per patch management policy.

TimeEntry.Title: Upgrade VMWare tools - AKT-DC-FS-01, MAX-DC-AD-01.
TimeEntry.Notes: Login to the vCenter and check the following machines needs to upgrade the VMware tool on it. Go to the VM and the initiate upgrade VMware tool on the machine successfully.AKT-DC-FS-01, MAX-DC-AD-01.

TimeEntry.Title: Device Non-Compliant Due to Missing Patches MAX-DC-VDI-001,MAX-DC-AD-01
TimeEntry.Notes:
Devices MAX-DC-VDI-001 and MAX-DC-AD-01 were identified as non-compliant due to missing patches.

Logged in to the ManageEngine portal and verified pending updates on both systems. Proceeded with patch remediation by installing the following updates:

  • Microsoft Defender Antivirus – Version 1.445.699.0
  • Microsoft Edge for Chromium Business (x64) – Version 146.0.3856.72
  • Microsoft WebView2 Runtime (x64) – Version 146.0.3856.72

After installation, performed a manual patch scan on both systems to verify successful deployment and to clear the non-compliant status.

Post validation, confirmed that all patches have been successfully applied and no high vulnerabilities remain. Both systems are now compliant as per patch management policy.

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version 0.14.150 on MAX-DC-AD-01, AKT-DC-FS-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following machines on is old version 0.14.146. Connected to the machines MAX-DC-AD-01, AKT-DC-FS-01 from manage engine, download and installed the latest Version 0.14.150. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.

TimeEntry.Notes: Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following servers on is old version V0.14.146. Connected to the machines (MAX-DC-VDI-GI, MAX-DC-VDI-001, MAX-DC-VDI-002) from manage engine, download and installed the latest version V0.14.150. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Snapshot consolidation required - AKT-DC-FS-01.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server AKT-DC-FS-01 is on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully and then login to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine.

TimeEntry.Title: Snapshot consolidation required - MAX-DC-AD-01.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server MAX-DC-AD-01 is on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully and then login to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine.

TimeEntry.Title: MAX-DC-AD-01,MAX-DC-VDI-001, MAX-DC-VDI-002, MAX-DC-VDI-GI : Myremote update with latest version
TimeEntry.Notes: I accessed the machines and updated ScreenConnect to the latest version (26.1.22.9573).
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: MAX-DC-VDI-GI,MAX-DC-AD-01 & MAX-DC-VDI-001 has Missing patch while last run
TimeEntry.Notes:
Logged in to the ManageEngine portal and verified pending updates on all affected systems. Proceeded with patch remediation by installing the following updates:

  • Adobe Acrobat DC (64-bit) – Version 26.001.21346
  • 2026-03 Cumulative Update Preview for Windows 11, Version 25H2 for x64-based Systems – KB5079391 (OS Build 26200.8116)
  • Microsoft 365 Apps for Business (Current Channel, x64) – Version 2603 (Build 19822.20114)

After installation, performed a manual patch scan on all systems to verify successful deployment and to clear the non-compliant status.

Post validation, confirmed that all patches have been successfully applied and no high vulnerabilities remain. All systems are now compliant as per patch management policy.

TimeEntry.Title: Manage-Engine Latest version 11.5.2600.32.W updated on MAX-DC-VDI-002 , MAX-DC-VDI-GI & AKT-DC-FS-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Reviewed the RMM portal and identified that the  MAX-DC-VDI-002 , MAX-DC-VDI-GI & AKT-DC-FS-01 were running an outdated version of ManageEngine.  downloaded and installed the latest version (11.5.2600.32.W) of the ManageEngine agent. scan the system with the  portal that the device now runs the updated agent version

TimeEntry.Title: Upgrade VMWare tools - AKT-DC-FS-01, MAX-DC-AD-01, MAX-DC-VDI-002.
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login to the vCenter and check the following machines needs to upgrade the VMware tool on it. Go to the VM and the initiate upgrade VMware tool on the machine successfully.

AKT-DC-FS-01, MAX-DC-AD-01, MAX-DC-VDI-002.

TimeEntry.Title: MyRMM Manage-Engine Latest version (11.5.2600.32.W) updated:- MAX-DC-VDI-001 and MAX-DC-AD-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the portal, Found New Agent Version (11.5.2600.32.W) was released, and Pushed the sensor from the portal but it failed so connected to the below machine ( MAX-DC-VDI-001 and MAX-DC-AD-01) from Manage Engine, Tried to update the version but got an error (old version is already installed on it) so removed the earlier installed version. Downloaded and installed the new version after verifying the same from the portal, Devices are up to date with the latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Cisco Umbrella Agent Syncing Issue with Portal for machines AKT-DC-FS-01,MAX-DC-AD-01,MAX-DC-VDI-001,MAX-DC-VDI-GI
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the Cisco Umbrella portal and identified that machines AKT-DC-FS-01,MAX-DC-AD-01,MAX-DC-VDI-001,MAX-DC-VDI-GI were experiencing syncing issues with the Cisco Umbrella portal. I then connected to the affected machines and addressed the network connectivity settings. After ensuring proper communication between the agent and the portal, the agent is now successfully syncing and communicating with the Cisco Umbrella cloud, with the correct status and configuration reflected in the portal.

TimeEntry.Title: Network Detective Scan MAX-April-2026
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the rapid-fire tool and then initiate a network scan for MAX client. After Scan is complete for all then start generating the reports. then Go to the web and then generate the reports for MAX and copy the reports to Teams folder under Monthly scan folder

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version 0.14.162, replaced with Version 0.14.150 on MAX-DC-AD-01, AKT-DC-FS-01, MAX-DC-VDI-001, MAX-DC-VDI-002
TimeEntry.Notes: Huntress Agent updated with Version 0.14.162, replaced with Version 0.14.150 on MAX-DC-AD-01, AKT-DC-FS-01, MAX-DC-VDI-001, MAX-DC-VDI-002

TimeEntry.Title: Manage Engine Synchronization Issue for MAX Machine AKT-DC-FS-01 and MAX-DC-VDI-002
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Manage engine portal and found the agent on machines AKT-DC-FS-01 and MAX-DC-VDI-002 not communication with portal. So connected to the machine, tried to restart the service, but nothing happened. So, Uninstall the Corrupt manage engine then download and the latest manage engine agent. After that agent on machine is communicating with the portal and working fine hence closing this ticket
